strategy_description: Deep passive quotes (bb+7/ba-7 on VEV_4000, bb+5/ba-5 on VEV_4500) when spread >= 18; size 2. Extract/hydrogel penny-MM with EMA fair and vega-weighted skew from BS delta on the two strikes (T proxy 6d/365y). VEV_4500 rarely fills in backtest (no tape trades most days).

Parameter sweep: spread gate 16 for both strikes; symmetric deep offset 6; passive size 3. Same extract/hydrogel and delta skew. Improves total PnL vs v0; VEV_4500 still ~0 PnL (historical trades file has almost no VEV_4500 prints).
Sweep asymmetric offsets (4500 bb+4); same total as v1 in worse-fill regime — dominated by VEV_4000 + hydrogel.
VEV_4500 touch quotes (bb+1/ba-1) vs deep 4000; still no 4500 PnL — matching relies on tape trades; VEV_4500 has O(1) trades across Round-3 CSVs. Kept for documentation.

Same thesis (deep passive wide-book on VEV_4000/4500, tiny size). Verified mini-sweep around v1 found best at WIDE_SPREAD_MIN=16, VEV_4000 offset=5, PASSIVE_SIZE=3, EXTRACT_PASSIVE_SIZE=6, HYDRO_PASSIVE_SIZE=2. 4500 still quoted but has near-zero tape market trades in ROUND_3, so realized edge remains concentrated in 4000 + delta-1 ballast.

Parent v4. Added BS call vega from tape IV; extract skew = pos*delta*DELTA_SKEW + pos*vega*VEGA_SKEW (capped). Sweep: DELTA_SKEW=0.3, VEGA_SKEW=0.0005 (small vega hedge; 0.3/0 tied same total on grid but we keep vega term). Deep passive 4000/4500 unchanged.

v5 base (delta+vega extract skew) + optional second deep passive on VEV_4000/4500 when L1 spread >= 20: extra bb+6/ba-6 and bb+5/ba-5 style pairs with size 2, room reserved vs limits. Added BS call gamma to tape analysis (not used in extract skew: grid found any GAMMA_SKEW>0 hurt; tier-only is neutral vs v5 on backtest, total 29,147).
